title: Superhuman accuracy on the SNEMI3D connectomics challenge
abstract: We report the first submission to surpass the estimate of human accuracy on the SNEMI3D connectomics benchmark. A 3D U-Net variant trained on affinity prediction achieves superhuman boundary detection in EM volumes.
notes: Already in existing 102. Cross-listed under Kisuk Lee as first author. Also filed under seung/seung-2017-superhuman.
